name: contora
description: Contora: local workspace memory (task, notes, editors, Git), event JSONL, checkpoints, heuristic intent/ranking, ignore rules, token budget — export AI-ready context to clipboard (markdown, JSON, MCP, etc.).

contora.autoRestoreOnOpen.description: When opening the workspace, restore editors from .contora/state.json (legacy .context-recall/state.json is read if present).

contora.maxRestoreEditors.description: Maximum editors to open on auto-restore (0 = open none).

contora.workingSetMaxFiles.description: Max paths in working set (recentFiles); counts focus/save only.

contora.defaultAIMode.description: Default AI mode for structured export (# MODE / instruction).

contora.exportFormat.description: Export: markdown / cursor fences / JSON schema v2 / Claude framing / OpenAI messages JSON / MCP getContext envelope.

contora.persistEventLog.description: Append each workspace event to .contora/events/<sessionId>.jsonl (immutable log).

contora.maxPriorityFiles.description: Max ranked paths in # PRIORITY FILES / payload (capped by mode strategy).

contora.maxEventBuffer.description: Max session events kept in memory (ring buffer).

contora.eventsInPrompt.description: How many recent events to append under # RECENT EVENTS in export.

contora.exportTokenBudget.description: Approx max tokens for export (0 = unlimited). Trims markdown/cursor/claude/openai text or shrinks JSON/MCP payload.

contora.useDefaultIgnoreRules.description: Exclude noisy paths (node_modules, venv, .git, dist, …) from ranking, summary, export lists.

contora.extraIgnoreSubstrings.description: Extra path substrings to exclude (case-insensitive substring match on workspace-relative paths).

contora.cooccurrenceWindow.description: Event window size for CONTEXT GRAPH co-occurrence edges.

contora.mergeDiskEventLog.description: On workspace sync, merge JSONL events from disk into the in-memory ring buffer (same sessionId).

contora.writeLatestMemoryOnSave.description: After Save session state, also write .contora/memory/latest-memory.json (ranked memory mirror).
